mapper.sql: l.id, l.user_id, l.room_id, l.seat_id, l.lease_number, l.start_date, l.end_date, l.status, l.payment_status, l.payment_deadline, l.payment_time, l.amount, l.trade_no, l.apply_reason, l.audit_remark, l.create_time, l.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM long_term_lease l LEFT JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON l.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON l.seat_id = s.id WHERE l.id = #{id}

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM long_term_lease l LEFT JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON l.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON l.seat_id = s.id WHERE l.lease_number = #{leaseNumber}

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM long_term_lease l LEFT JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON l.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON l.seat_id = s.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM long_term_lease l LEFT JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON l.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON l.seat_id = s.id ORDER BY l.create_time DESC

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM long_term_lease l LEFT JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON l.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON l.seat_id = s.id WHERE l.status = #{status} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC
SELECT FROM long_term_lease l WHERE l.room_id = #{roomId} AND l.status IN (2, 5, 6) AND CURDATE() BETWEEN l.start_date AND l.end_date LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM long_term_lease l WHERE l.seat_id = #{seatId} AND l.status IN (2, 5, 6) AND CURDATE() BETWEEN l.start_date AND l.end_date LIMIT 1

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM long_term_lease l LEFT JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON l.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON l.seat_id = s.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.status IN (2, 5, 6) AND CURDATE() BETWEEN l.start_date AND l.end_date ORDER BY l.start_date ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT , u.username, sr.room_name, sr.room_number, s.seat_number, s.seat_name FROM long_term_lease l LEFT JOIN user u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON l.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN seat s ON l.seat_id = s.id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.status IN (2, 5, 6) AND l.start_date <= DATE(#{endTime}) AND l.end_date >= DATE(#{startTime}) ORDER BY l.start_date ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM long_term_lease l WHERE l.status = 0

SELECT FROM long_term_lease l WHERE l.status = 1 AND l.payment_status = 0 AND ( (l.payment_deadline IS NOT NULL AND l.payment_deadline <= NOW()) OR (l.payment_deadline IS NULL AND l.create_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR)) )
SELECT FROM long_term_lease l WHERE l.seat_id = #{seatId} AND l.payment_status = 0 AND l.status IN (0, 1)
SELECT FROM long_term_lease l WHERE l.seat_id = #{seatId} AND l.status IN (2, 5, 6) AND DATE(l.start_date) <= DATE(#{endTime}) AND DATE(l.end_date) >= DATE(#{startTime})
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM long_term_lease l WHERE l.seat_id = #{seatId} AND l.payment_status = 1 AND l.status IN (2, 5, 6) AND CURDATE() BETWEEN l.start_date AND l.end_date LIMIT 1
